reasoning: The base rate of a pilot reporting a UFO in an African country in any single specific month to the US-based National UFO Reporting Center (NUFORC) is astronomically low (estimated to be well under 1%). Given the lack of positive evidence and the extremely low base rate, the probability is set to the minimum allowed value of 0.02.
